sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108941" key="u(popie/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποπιέζω</orth>, <sense id="n108941.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑπωπιάζω</ref> </xr> (which Turnebus restored) in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.921f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
